title: Software Engineering vs. Product Management
description: Compare career trajectories between an SWE and a PM role
context: I have 3 years of backend dev experience. I'm considering switching to Product Management. My goal is a senior leadership role in 7-10 years. Current CTC: ₹18 LPA. Risk tolerance: medium.
quick_prompt: Should I switch from Software Engineering to Product Management after 3 years of experience targeting a senior leadership role in 10 years?

title: MS in Data Science vs. MBA in IT
description: Evaluate graduate program ROI, placements, and career impact
context: Fresh grad with 2 years experience. Budget: ₹25-40 lakh. Goal: data-driven product leadership or ML engineering. Target: top-10 MNC by age 30.
quick_prompt: Should I pursue an MS in Data Science or an MBA in IT Management? Budget: ₹30 lakh, goal is tech leadership by 30.

title: Mutual Fund SIP vs. Fixed Deposit
description: Compare risk-adjusted returns for surplus fund allocation
context: Monthly surplus: ₹15,000. Investment horizon: 5-7 years. Risk tolerance: moderate. Goal: corpus for home down payment. Age: 28.
quick_prompt: Should I invest ₹15,000/month in a dynamic Mutual Fund SIP or a Fixed Deposit? 5-year horizon, moderate risk, saving for a home down payment.

title: Laptop Selection for Developer
description: Choose the best coding laptop within a ₹75,000 budget
context: Full-stack developer. Daily use: VS Code, Docker, multiple browser tabs. Budget: ₹75,000. Preference: battery life and build quality.
quick_prompt: Compare the best laptop for coding under ₹75,000 INR: Ryzen 7 16GB vs i7 16GB vs M2 MacBook Air 8GB.

title: Credit Card Selection
description: Evaluate reward structure, fees, and benefits across top cards
context: Monthly spend: ₹40,000. Top categories: fuel (₹8K), dining (₹10K), online shopping (₹15K). Looking for maximum reward redemption value.
quick_prompt: Which credit card is best for monthly spend of ₹40,000 across fuel, dining, and online shopping: HDFC Regalia Gold, Axis Magnus, or SBI BPCL Octane?

title: Home Loan: Fixed vs. Floating Rate
description: Analyze total interest cost, EMI stability, and prepayment flexibility
context: Loan amount: ₹50 lakh. Tenure: 20 years. Expectation: rate cut cycle over next 2 years. Monthly income: ₹1.2 lakh.
quick_prompt: Should I choose a Fixed Rate (8.5%) or Floating Rate (8.1%) home loan of ₹50 lakh over 20 years given expected RBI rate cuts?

title: Term Insurance vs. Health Insurance Priority
description: Determine optimal insurance allocation with limited budget
context: Age: 32, married, one dependent child. Annual insurance budget: ₹30,000. Employer provides basic ₹3L health cover. No existing life cover.
quick_prompt: I'm 32 with a family of 3 and a ₹30,000 annual insurance budget. Should I prioritize a ₹1 Cr term plan or comprehensive health insurance first?

title: Build vs. Buy Software Decision
description: Evaluate custom development vs. SaaS for enterprise workflow automation
context: Mid-size logistics company. 200 users. Budget: ₹40 lakh capex or ₹8 lakh/year opex. Timeline: 6 months. Requirements: 80% standard, 20% custom workflows.
quick_prompt: Should a 200-user logistics company build custom workflow software (₹40L capex) or buy a SaaS solution (₹8L/year) with 20% custom needs?
